scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check:lines && npm run typecheck && npm run test:all && npm run build && npm run check:rust
scripts.format: oxfmt --write .github integrations scripts web/index.html web/src web/e2e web/*.ts *.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check .github integrations scripts web/index.html web/src web/e2e web/*.ts *.json
scripts.lint: oxlint --deny-warnings --ignore-pattern 'web/src/wasm-pkg/**' integrations scripts web/src web/e2e web/*.ts
